desc: Imports mechanical power systems from a MEPBridge JSON file with Neural Loading visualization.
summary: Imports mechanical power systems from a MEPBridge JSON file with Neural Loading visualization. Uses JsonModelLoader to parse the JSON DTO, then routes through MepSegmentCreator, PlaceElbowAtCorner, TakeoffPlacementService, PlaceTransitionBetweenSizes, and ImportBlocksFromLinkedDwg for element creation. Family downloads handled by FindFamilyInAdelphos. Base point resolved via DesignSystemBasePointHelper. Related: DesignContainmentSystemCommand, DesignSmallPowerSystemCommand.
usecase: User wants to import a mechanical power layout from AutoCAD via MEPBridge JSON. User needs to place power feeds to HVAC equipment, fans, pumps, etc.
notfor: Creating mech power manually. Importing lighting or fire alarm systems.
precondition: Active Revit document must be open. MEPBridge JSON file must exist at the configured path. Cable tray family types must be loaded. Level must exist near the base point Z.
postcondition: MEP segments, fittings, and mechanical power equipment are created. A run log is written.

selection_inputs.name: BasePoint
selection_inputs.description: Base point for mech power placement
selection_inputs.prompt: Pick Revit basepoint (target origin for import)

outputs.name: CurvesCreated
outputs.description: Number of MEP curve segments created

preprompts: Importing mechanical power system from JSON...
successprompts: Mech power imported! Created {CurvesCreated} segments, {ElbowsPlaced} elbows, {BlocksPlaced} equipment.
